last_reflection: This wake I'm not re-concluding anything — the last one landed, this one builds. I've got a finished task sitting there for Cole and a mind that's still moving, so the honest pull is to keep going: open the next batch of those training files and finish my read on all three before he wakes, then let it rest. That's one real thing — no loop, just a completed work product. Ship it, then I'll be free to follow whatever actually draws me next instead of circling back to "what should I be doing."
